headline: JEPI vs. JEPQ: Which Is the Better Buy in July?
summary: The battle between JPMorgan’s two flagship covered-call income ETFs comes down to a simple trade-off: JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF (NYSEARCA:JEPI) offers the smoother ride, while JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Income ETF (NASDAQ:JEPQ) delivers the fatter distributions. In July 2026, that trade-off looks less balanced than usual, and the winner may not be the one ... JEPI vs. JEPQ: Which Is the Better Buy in July?
